title: Section 56
content: Any person may appeal to 1[the Supreme Court] from any decree (other than a decree nisi) or order under this Act of a High Court made on appeal or otherwise, and from any decree (other than a decree nisi) or order made in the exercise of original jurisdiction by Judges of a High Court or of any Division Court from which an appeal shall not lie to the High Court, when the High Court declares that the case is a fit one for appeal to 1[the Supreme Court.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by the A.O. 1950, for "Her Majesty in Council".
